Stop using the word sent as proof a supplier got paid.

PH1.template: Here's what every business owner needs to know about (insert thing) that say (insert claim) but aren't (insert reality).
PH1.text: Here's what every business owner needs to know about wires that say sent but aren't arrived.
Picture this. Tuesday morning. You wire your supplier. Your app pings. Sent. You message her the money is on the way. An hour later she writes back. Nothing has come in. Who's right? Both of you.
